title: 'Dangerous escalation': World condemns Iran after attacks on UAE — Saudi, Qatar, Germany, France, UK, EU, India
snippet: Wave of international condemnation. Saudi Arabia: 'condemns and denounces in the strongest terms', affirms solidarity with UAE. Qatar: 'strongly condemns, blatant violation of sovereignty'. Kuwait: 'reprehensible aggression, clear breach of freedom of navigation'. Bahrain: 'dangerous escalation, urges UNSC action'. Jordan: 'dangerous escalation, threat to UAE security'. Germany/Merz: 'Tehran must return to negotiating table'. France/Macron: 'unjustified and unacceptable'. UK/Starmer: 'Iran needs to engage meaningfully'. EU/von der Leyen: 'unacceptable, clear violation of sovereignty'. India/Modi: 'Strongly condemn' (3 Indian nationals injured). Canada: 'strongly condemns unprovoked strikes'. GCC Secretary-General: 'piracy and serious extortion'. Muslim World League also condemns.
tag_reason: 4/8 휴전 이후 최초의 대규모 국제 공동 규탄 — 걸프·서방·아시아가 동시 대응한 신규 외교적 전개
